scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,frontend -c cyan,green,yellow --restart-tries -1 --restart-after 2000 "./scripts/run-python.sh -m uvicorn backend.api.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "./scripts/run-python.sh -m backend.workers.runner" "npm run dev --workspace frontend -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
